content:
📜 Certain items will be limited in quantity and availability.

✔ Capped Items:
• Weekly Items Found in the Environment (Limited based on availability in that week’s settings.)
• Legendary Items (Rare, extremely powerful, limited to one per cycle.)
• Long-Term Items (Once unearthed, they last until the course ends but can be stolen or lost.)

✔ How This Works:
• Players can discover, trade, or lose items.
• Some items have expiration windows.
• Legendary items disappear if not claimed within a set timeframe.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Encourages active exploration and competition for resources.
✔ Prevents an imbalance where too many players hold powerful items at once.
✔ Adds strategic depth to item use and acquisition.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 504 (chunk 504/555)
